zh.St Mary's Church, Reading, Berkshire, En: 英國波克夏雷亞丁聖 馬也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Ware Weare於大約1516年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾哈爾費爾德時，他的父親Sir William Richard Warre15歲，母親Lady Joan Stourton14歲。他於1534年與Ann Brockman在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾哈爾費爾德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1572年11月18日在英國哈普爾維爾享年57歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特度爾維頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Ware Weare于大约1516年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾哈爾費爾德时，他的父亲Sir William Richard Warre15岁，母亲Lady Joan Stourton14岁。他于1534年与Ann Brockman在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾哈爾費爾德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1572年11月18日在英国哈普爾維爾享年57岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特度爾維頓。

nameMeanings.name: Weare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Wear   or   Ware  .

variants.name: Wear
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by the Wear river in northeastern England. The river name is ancient, occuring in the form Vedra in Ptolemy's Geographia; it is probably from a Celtic word meaning ‘water’.
topographic name for someone who lived near a dam or weir, a variant of Ware 1, or a habitational name from a place called Weare, in Devon and Somerset, from Old English wær, wer ‘weir’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Ware
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin either a local name from the medieval vocabulary word wade ‘ford’ (old English (ge)wæd), or else from a medieval given name representing a survival of Old English Wada, a derivative of wadan ‘to go’, borne, according to legend, by a great sea-giant.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Ware Weare was born about 1516, in Charfield, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir William Richard Warre, was 15 and his mother, Lady Joan Stourton, was 14. He married Ann Brockman in 1534, in Charfield, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 18 November 1572, in Weyhill, Hampshire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Dulverton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Ware Weare est né environ 1516, à Charfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Richard Warre, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Stourton, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Ann Brockman en 1534, à Charfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 18 novembre 1572, à Weyhill, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Dulverton, Somerset, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Ware Weare è nato il circa 1516 nel Charfield, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Richard Warre, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan Stourton, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Ann Brockman nel 1534, nel Charfield, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 18 novembre 1572, nel Weyhill, Hampshire, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Dulverton, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Ware Weareが約1516年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチャーフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir William Richard Warreは15歳，母Lady Joan Stourtonは14歳であった。1534年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチャーフィールドでAnn Brockmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1572年11月18日にイギリスハンプシュアイアウエイヒルで57歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトダルバートンにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary's Church, Reading, Berkshire, En: 영국 버크실르 리딩 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Ware Weare(이)가 대략 1516년 영국 그루스스터실르 처필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Richard Warre(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Stourton(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1534년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 처필드에서 Ann Brockman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1572년 11월 18일 영국 함프실르 w이힐에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 드버턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Ware Weare nasceu aproximadamente 1516, em Charfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Richard Warre, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Stourton, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Brockman em 1534, em Charfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de novembro de 1572, em Weyhill, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Dulverton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Ware Weare родился около 1516 г. в местности чарфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Richard Warre было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Stourton, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Brockman в 1534 г. в местности чарфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 18 ноября 1572 г. в местности вихилл, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности дулвиртон, сомирсет, Англия.
